compiled_state.title: RED test: assert zero tdd-workflow references remain in codebase
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description: Write tests/scripts/test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh that asserts no tdd-workflow references remain in in-scope codebase. Executes grep -r tdd-workflow excluding .tickets-tracker, .git, and itself. Asserts count equals zero. Currently fails RED because refs exist. Negative constraint test per Behavioral Test Requirement.

comments.body:
I don't see a ticket description in your message. Could you please provide the actual ticket details (title, description, requirements, etc.) so I can analyze which files would be impacted?

Once you share the ticket content, I'll be able to identify the most likely source and test files to modify.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tests/scripts/test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh
- [ ] Test script searches for tdd-workflow references excluding .tickets-tracker, .git, and itself
  Verify: grep -q 'tdd-workflow' tests/scripts/test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh
- [ ] Test currently fails RED (non-zero exit) because tdd-workflow references still exist
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index entry exists for this test file
  Verify: grep -q 'test-tdd-workflow-removal' .test-index
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh (created), .test-index (updated). Tests: RED as expected (16 references found).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: RED test written and verified — test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh exists, is executable, and fails RED with 16 references found
